parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "professional_id": "{{ $node["Execute Workflow Trigger"].json.professional.id }}",
  "patient_name": "{{ $node["Extract Order Arguments"].json.client_name }}",
  "patient_phone": "{{ $node["Execute Workflow Trigger"].json.phone }}",
  "appointment_date": "{{ $node["Extract Order Arguments"].json.appointment_date }}",
  "appointment_time": "{{ $node["Extract Order Arguments"].json.appointment_time }}",
  "reason": "Pedido: {{ $node["Extract Order Arguments"].json.order_details }} | Entrega: {{ $node["Extract Order Arguments"].json.delivery_type }} | Dirección: {{ $node["Extract Order Arguments"].json.delivery_address }} | Pago: {{ $node["Extract Order Arguments"].json.payment_method }}"
}

={{ { professional_id: $node["Execute Workflow Trigger"].json.professional.id, patient_phone: $node["Execute Workflow Trigger"].json.phone, patient_name: $node["Execute Workflow Trigger"].json.pushName || '', message: $node["Execute Workflow Trigger"].json.message, sender: "user" } }}
